entries.source: Treat this as a stateful, evidence-aware historical simulation with a passport, travel advisory, world view, and choices.
entries.value: Posmatraj ovo kao historijsku simulaciju koja pamti stanje i uvažava dokaze, s pasošem, savjetom za putovanje, pogledom na svijet i izborima.

entries.source: Treating a popular market as an attractive market.
entries.value: Tretiranje popularnog tržišta kao privlačnog tržišta.

entries.source: Treating religion as private opinion rather than public order would sound strange and possibly dangerous.
entries.value: Tretiranje religije kao privatnog mišljenja umjesto dijela javnog poretka zvučalo bi čudno i moguće opasno.

entries.source: Treats revenue growth as value growth.
entries.value: Tretira rast prihoda kao rast vrijednosti.

entries.source: Treats style as a substitute for reasoning.
entries.value: Tretira stil kao zamjenu za rasuđivanje.

entries.source: Trial talk travels through civic spaces
entries.value: Razgovor o suđenju širi se javnim gradskim prostorima

entries.source: Try first: a coffee tax raises sellers' cost. What should you expect before seeing the graph?
entries.value: Prvo probaj: porez na kafu povećava trošak prodavaca. Šta bi trebalo očekivati prije nego što vidiš grafikon?

entries.source: Try first: a value logs as undefined right after a fetch call. What is the most useful first check?
entries.value: Prvo probaj: vrijednost se zabilježi kao undefined odmah nakon fetch poziva. Koja je najkorisnija prva provjera?

entries.source: Try first: if sales grow 20% but margins shrink and inventory needs jump, what probably happens to free cash flow?
entries.value: Prvo probaj: ako prodaja poraste 20%, ali se marže smanje i potrebe za zalihama naglo porastu, šta se vjerovatno dešava sa slobodnim novčanim tokom?

entries.source: Try first: in food delivery, which force is most likely strengthened by customers comparing prices across apps?
entries.value: Prvo probaj: kod dostave hrane, koja se sila najvjerovatnije pojačava kada kupci upoređuju cijene kroz više aplikacija?

entries.source: Try first: what is better evidence that you understand a new concept?
entries.value: Prvo probaj: koji je bolji dokaz da razumiješ novi pojam?

entries.source: Try first: which sentence usually needs repair when evidence is present but the paragraph still feels unconvincing?
entries.value: Prvo probaj: koju rečenicu obično treba popraviti kada dokazi postoje, ali odlomak i dalje djeluje neuvjerljivo?

entries.source: Try this frame: "When ___ changes, ___ changes because ___."
entries.value: Probaj ovaj okvir: "Kada se ___ promijeni, ___ se promijeni zato što ___."

entries.source: Turn material into a deck you actually test yourself on.
entries.value: Pretvori materijal u špil kartica uz koji se zaista sam ispituješ.

entries.source: Turn the weak spot into a quiz, flashcards, or a follow-up chat.
entries.value: Pretvori slabu tačku u kviz, kartice za učenje ili nastavak razgovora.

entries.source: Understand basics, solve problems, revise fast...
entries.value: Razumij osnove, rješavaj zadatke, brzo ponavljaj...

entries.source: Understand photosynthesis, write an essay plan...
Understanding means you can predict, explain, and use an idea in a new situation. Reading is only the start.
entries.value: Razumijevanje znači da možeš predvidjeti, objasniti i upotrijebiti ideju u novoj situaciji. Čitanje je samo početak.

entries.source: Unresolved until the historical setting is specified.
entries.value: Neriješeno dok se ne odredi historijski kontekst.

entries.source: Unverified details must stay visibly uncertain
entries.value: Neprovjereni detalji moraju ostati vidljivo nesigurni

entries.source: Use only as the last resort.
Use the dossier to see what incentives, fears, allies, and enemies shape the reply.
entries.value: Koristi dosje da vidiš koji poticaji, strahovi, saveznici i neprijatelji oblikuju odgovor.

entries.source: Use visible sections: Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, Next action.
entries.value: Koristi vidljive odjeljke: Zajednički artefakt, doprinos AI-ja, korisnikov potez, komentari u tekstu, dnevnik odluka, otvorena pitanja, sljedeća radnja.

entries.source: User's purpose: help them choose sharp opening questions.
entries.value: Svrha korisnika: pomoći mu da izabere oštra uvodna pitanja.

entries.source: Value = forecast free cash flows discounted for risk + discounted terminal value.
entries.value: Vrijednost = prognozirani slobodni novčani tokovi diskontovani za rizik + diskontovana terminalna vrijednost.
Sistemi gradskih kvartova oblikovali su urbani život

entries.source: West Market during the Tang dynasty
Wet dust, shouted rumors, smoke, prayer calls, and the metallic anxiety of a city under pressure.
entries.value: Mokra prašina, dovikivane glasine, dim, pozivi na molitvu i metalna tjeskoba grada pod pritiskom.

entries.source: What are we trying to build, solve, learn, or improve?
entries.value: Šta pokušavamo izgraditi, riješiti, naučiti ili poboljšati?

entries.source: What do you want to ask, test, learn, or confront?
entries.value: Šta želiš pitati, testirati, naučiti ili osporiti?

entries.source: What do you want to understand or be able to do?
entries.value: Šta želiš razumjeti ili moći uraditi?

entries.source: What kind of journey is this?
What they value, defend, miss, or refuse.
entries.value: Šta cijene, brane, propuštaju ili odbijaju.

entries.source: What would you like to be quizzed on today?
entries.value: Iz čega bi danas želio da te ispitujem?

entries.source: Where and when do you want to go?
Whether one encounter changes a crowd's direction
entries.value: Da li jedan susret mijenja smjer gomile

entries.source: Who pressures them, supports them, or threatens them.
entries.value: Ko ih pritiska, podržava ili im prijeti.

entries.source: Write a 4 sentence paragraph with a claim, evidence, explanation, and consequence.
entries.value: Napiši odlomak od 4 rečenice s tvrdnjom, dokazom, objašnjenjem i posljedicom.

entries.source: Write a short answer. The app checks the link, not polish.
entries.value: Napiši kratak odgovor. Aplikacija provjerava vezu, ne dotjeranost.

entries.source: Write the core link in one sentence before moving on.
entries.value: Napiši osnovnu vezu u jednoj rečenici prije nego što nastaviš.

entries.source: Write your answer, even if it is rough.
entries.value: Napiši svoj odgovor, čak i ako je grub.

entries.source: Yes. Evidence needs interpretation or the argument feels unfinished.
entries.value: Da. Dokazima treba tumačenje, inače argument djeluje nedovršeno.

entries.source: Yes. You connected sales, margins, and working capital instead of treating one line as the whole model.
entries.value: Da. Povezao si prodaju, marže i obrtni kapital umjesto da jednu stavku tretiraš kao cijeli model.

entries.source: You add ideas first so the buddy can build with you.
entries.value: Prvo dodaješ ideje kako bi drug za učenje mogao graditi s tobom.

entries.source: You can recognize the definition when it appears.
entries.value: Možeš prepoznati definiciju kada se pojavi.

entries.source: You can use it correctly in a new example.
entries.value: Možeš je pravilno upotrijebiti u novom primjeru.

entries.source: You gave enough of the causal link to move forward.
entries.value: Dao si dovoljno uzročne veze da možeš nastaviti.

entries.source: You have a starting map now. Let us rebuild the weak spots.
entries.value: Sada imaš početnu mapu. Hajde da obnovimo slabe tačke.

entries.source: You have evidence for this step. Use Continue to move ahead.
entries.value: Imaš dokaz za ovaj korak. Koristi Nastavi da kreneš dalje.

entries.source: You named a changed input and connected it to the result. That is the move we are training.
entries.value: Imenovao si promijenjeni ulaz i povezao ga s rezultatom. To je potez koji vježbamo.

entries.source: You read three explanations about it.
entries.value: Pročitao si tri objašnjenja o tome.

entries.source: Your answer controls the next question.
Your answer needs a clearer because-link: what changed, what it affected, and why.
entries.value: Tvom odgovoru treba jasnija veza sa "zato što": šta se promijenilo, na šta je uticalo i zašto.

entries.source: Your buddy works beside you: you contribute ideas, the app organizes them, and both of you checkpoint progress.
entries.value: Tvoj drug za učenje radi uz tebe: ti doprinosiš ideje, aplikacija ih organizuje, a oboje provjeravate napredak.

entries.source: Your status controls language, money, access, danger, and what questions sound natural.
entries.value: Tvoj status određuje jezik, novac, pristup, opasnost i koja pitanja zvuče prirodno.

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Zanima te baš bilo šta? Pitaj, istražuj i idi dublje svojim tempom. Tvoj drug za učenje čini ideje praktičnim, pamtljivim i lakim za nadogradnju. Probaj: "Objasni kako berza zaista funkcioniše."

entries.source: What are you curious about today?
Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Postavi bilo koje pitanje i uči kroz jasna objašnjenja, primjere, dodatne promptove i strpljivo AI podučavanje.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Znatiželjni učenici, studenti, roditelji i samouki stvaratelji koji žele prijateljsko mjesto za početak.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Umjesto da samo izbaci dug odgovor, inspir ti pomaže izabrati jednostavniju osnovu, dublju rutu ili praktičan primjer.

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question
A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning
entries.value: Vođena komora za rasuđivanje kroz disciplinovana pitanja

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Pretvori pojam, argument, problem, tekst ili odluku u fokusiran lanac pitanja. Tvoj drug za učenje sluša svaki odgovor, mapira pretpostavke i praznine i vodi te prema tvojoj završnoj sintezi. Probaj: "Pomozi mi da razumijem oportunitetni trošak."

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: Odgovori na aktivno pitanje svojim riječima

entries.source: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Uči kroz fokusirana pitanja, nagovještaje i promišljanje umjesto pasivnog čitanja odgovora.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Učenici koji žele promisliti temu, testirati pretpostavke i izgraditi trajno razumijevanje.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Tutor postavlja jedno pitanje odjednom, čeka tvoje rasuđivanje i sintetizuje tek nakon što pokušaš.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model
Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Treba li kompanija ući na ovo tržište?

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Gradi, kritički preispituj i uči u zajedničkoj radnoj sobi

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Otvori zajednički radni prostor s AI saradnikom. Napravi grubi artefakt, razmjenjuj izmjene, izazovi slabe tačke, bilježi odluke i izađi s konkretnim napretkom.

entries.source: Add your next edit, decision, question, or handoff
entries.value: Dodaj sljedeću izmjenu, odluku, pitanje ili primopredaju

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Otvori zajednički radni prostor s AI saradnikom. Napravi grubi artefakt, razmjenjuj izmjene, izazovi slabe tačke, bilježi odluke i izađi s konkretnim napretkom.

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Učenici koji istražuju osnovne teme i žele praktično vodstvo umjesto generičkog polja za odgovore.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ovaj način rada podešen je za kolaborativno podučavanje, s vlastitim promptovima, primjerima i tokom učenja.

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Gradi, kritički preispituj i uči u zajedničkoj radnoj sobi

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
Build a photosynthesis explanation with me
Adaptive lessons that make you do
entries.value: Prilagodljive lekcije koje te navode da radiš

entries.source: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Uči kroz rad, posmatranje, poređenje, popravljanje i dokazivanje savladanosti. Aplikacija gradi živo platno lekcije oko tvog cilja umjesto da podučavanje pretvori u dug chat. Probaj: "Nauči me finansijskom modeliranju."

entries.source: What would you like to learn today?
Learn by doing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery with an AI tutor that turns your goal into an active lesson.
entries.value: Uči kroz rad, poređenje, popravljanje i dokazivanje savladanosti uz AI tutora koji tvoj cilj pretvara u aktivnu lekciju.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Učenici koji žele vođeno platno lekcije s primjerima, provjerama i aktivnom vježbom umjesto dugog chat odgovora.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: Ovaj način rada drži sesiju interaktivnom, prelazeći između objašnjenja, koraka za pokušaj, provjera i popravki.

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Pomozi mi da naučim ponudu i potražnju

entries.source: 10 MCQs on any topic with a score
entries.value: 10 pitanja višestrukog izbora o bilo kojoj temi, s rezultatom

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Izaberi bilo koju temu i riješi fokusirani kviz od 10 pitanja višestrukog izbora. Odgovaraš na jedno pitanje odjednom, odmah dobijaš povratnu informaciju i završavaš s rezultatom i pregledom.

entries.source: What topic shall we put you to the test on?
entries.value: Iz koje teme da te stavimo na test?

entries.source: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Generiši fokusirani kviz višestrukog izbora o bilo kojoj temi i pregledaj objašnjenja nakon svakog odgovora.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Učenici koji žele aktivno prisjećanje, brzu vježbu i rezultat koji mogu poboljšati.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Kviz način rada skriva odgovore dok ne odgovoriš, a zatim svaki promašaj pretvara u tačku za ponavljanje.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Dobij vremenski pasoš, prođi savjet za putovanje, a zatim istraži određeno historijsko društvo kroz scenu, mapu, vremensku liniju, ljude, pravila, inventar i dokaze.

entries.source: What do you do next in this world?
entries.value: Šta sljedeće radiš u ovom svijetu?

entries.source: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Izradi vremenski pasoš, prođi savjet za putovanje i istraži historijski svijet kroz scenu, mapu, vremensku liniju, ljude, pravila, inventar i dokaze.

entries.source: History learners who want a specific society, identity, and set of constraints rather than a generic period summary.
entries.value: Učenici historije koji žele konkretno društvo, identitet i skup ograničenja umjesto generičkog sažetka perioda.

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Putovanje ostaje usidreno u stanju i dokazima: šta je poznato, šta je rekonstruisano, šta je spekulativno i čemu tvoj identitet realno može pristupiti.

entries.source: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Uđi u razgovor s historijskom figurom. Postavljaj pitanja, preispituj ideje i čuj svijet kroz njihovo doba, vrijednosti i ograničenja.

entries.source: Which historical figure would you like to meet?
entries.value: Koju historijsku figuru bi želio upoznati?

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Postavljaj pitanja, preispituj ideje i uči historiju kroz utemeljene razgovore s javnim ličnostima iz prošlosti.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Učenici koji žele razumjeti ljude, izbore i ideje u historijskom kontekstu.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Aplikacija odvaja razgovor u liku od kratkih kontekstualnih bilješki o zapisima i nesigurnosti.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Navedi stvarnu ili izmišljenu ličnost i debatuj s njom o bilo kojoj temi. AI prenosi njen javni stil i pogled na svijet, uz poštenu debatu.

entries.source: Who do you want to debate, and on what?
entries.value: S kim želiš debatovati i o čemu?

entries.source: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Vježbaj argumentaciju debatovanjem s javnom ili izmišljenom ličnošću o temi koju izabereš.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Učenici koji žele živu vježbu debate s pamtljivim glasovima i poštenim izazovom.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Debata koristi javni stil i pogled na svijet bez pretvaranja da poznaje privatna uvjerenja.

entries.source: Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg
entries.value: Debatuj o klimatskoj politici s Gretom Thunberg
Debatuj o ambiciji sa Steveom Jobsom

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Zastupaj obje strane i izoštri razmišljanje

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Izaberi bilo koju temu i suprotstavi se u pravoj debati. Izaberi stranu, prihvati izazov i nauči graditi bolje argumente.
Koja je tvoja tema debate danas?

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Debatuj o bilo kojoj temi, prihvati izazov, uporedi tvrdnje i nauči kako graditi jače argumente.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Studenti, debatanti, pisci i znatiželjni učenici koji žele snažnije rasuđivanje.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Trener iznosi jedan snažan protuargument odjednom i prati tvrdnje koje su važne.
